meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kits: Master Debugging & Build Faster
content.seo_description: Struggling to debug your code? Learn how to leverage SaaS starter kits with Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your development and build pro-grade apps.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors and logic traps. By adopting a pre-configured SaaS starter kit, you inherit battle-tested architecture. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous debugging to bridge the gap between student projects and professional-grade production software. This is how you reclaim your velocity and build confidence.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and you are staring at a stack trace that feels like a foreign language. You started with big dreams of building a SaaS, but now you are buried in dependency hell and unhandled promise rejections. This is the 'debugging wall'—the exact moment where most students quit. 

But here is the secret: professional engineers rarely write boilerplate from scratch. We use starter kits to provide the foundation, allowing us to focus on product logic rather than configuration. By integrating AI-driven debugging workflows, you transform your development process from a struggle into a high-speed execution loop.

steps.title: Bootstrap with a Production-Ready Boilerplate
steps.description: Don't reinvent the wheel. Use a starter kit that includes authentication, database ORM, and stripe integration out of the box to ensure your architecture is sound.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Next.js and Supabase architecture template, prioritizing type safety and modular directory structure.

steps.title: Automate Dependency Audits
steps.description: Debugging often starts with outdated packages. Use AI to scan your package.json and identify conflicting dependencies before they break your build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current package.json dependencies for version conflicts and suggest a stable migration path for the latest Next.js version.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task="audit and resolve dependency conflicts"

steps.title: Implement AI-Assisted Error Logging
steps.description: Standard logs are insufficient. Integrate a wrapper that sends stack traces directly to Claude for immediate root cause analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom error boundary component that captures state context and formats it for an AI analysis prompt.

steps.title: Refactor Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: When you hit a logic bug, don't guess. Have Claude Code perform a recursive trace of your state management flow to find the variable leak.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a deep trace on the user authentication state flow. Identify why the session cookie is not persisting across API routes.

steps.title: Validate with Integration Tests
steps.description: Debugging is only successful if it doesn't break other features. Automate your regression testing using your starter kit's built-in testing suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Playwright integration tests for the newly fixed authentication flow to ensure no regressions.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'clean' version of your starter kit in a separate branch to compare diffs when debugging.
Use Claude Code to document your 'why' in comments; AI-generated codebases often suffer from lack of context.
Leverage the 'Antigravity' prompt library to standardize your commit messages, making it easier to rollback buggy code.
Limit your AI context window by modularizing code; debug one feature-slice at a time rather than the whole app.
Treat your error logs as data; build a simple dashboard to see which features trigger the most bugs over time.
content.next_steps: After mastering the debugging loop, begin your first feature deployment. Focus on shipping a single, bug-free 'Hello World' SaaS module, then iterate by adding one database-driven feature per week.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your progress. By leveraging these tools, you are not just writing code—you are building a scalable, professional system that stands out to recruiters and customers alike. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
